titleStmt.title: SII 27.202: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 202. (A.R. No. 348 of 1930-31.) ARIGUḌI, (NEAR BAḶPA) PUTTUR TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up under a tree in a field near the Kāṇūr-maṭha.
This is dated Śaka 1484, Dundubhi, Vaiśākha śu. 3, Monday, corresponding to 1562 A.D., April 6.

It registers the gift of the village Baḷapa in Kaḍaba-sīme to god Subrahmaṇya of Kuke by Sadāśivarāya-nāyaka son of Chavuḍa-gauḍa of Keḷadi. This chief is stated to have received Maṅgalūru-rājya as māgāṇi from mahāmaṅḍalēśvara Aḷiya Rāmappaya who is referred to as ruling over the country from Vidyānagari. The record, however falls in the reign period of Sadāśivarāya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . namastuṁga śiraścuṁbi caṁdracāmara cāravē . trayilōkya naga
rāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svastiśrī jayābhyudaya
śālivāhana śakavaruṣa 1484 ne duṁdubhi saṁvatsara vayi
śākha śu 3 sōlu śrī manmahāmaṁḍalēśvara Aḷiyarāmappa
ayadēva mahā Arasaṁgaḷavaru vidyānagariyali ratna siṁ
hāsanārūḍharāgi sakalarājyaṁgaḷanu saddharmadalli pratipālisutihakāla
dali yaḍavamurāri kōṭi kōḷāhaḷa keḷadiya cauḍa gauḍara makaḷusadā
śivarāya nāyakaru kukeda subraṁhmaṇyadēvara Amrutapaḍi dharma
ke naṁdādīpakū śā baḷapagrāmada dharmaśāsanada kramaveṁteṁdare śrīmaṁnma
hā maṁḍalēśvara Aḷiyarāma Ayyadēva mahāarasu navage Avara mā
gaṇiyāgi pālsida maṁgalūru rājyakke saluva kaḍabada sīmeyoḷagaṇa ba
ḷpada grāmavanu Akṣatadigeya puṁṇya kāladalū kukeda subraṁhmaṇya dēva
rige śivārpaṇavāgi samarpisidevāgi Āgrāmake saluvakuḷa 14
kāga 242 ke kāvina pūrṇa dēvige hoka dharmakāra kāga 256 nyakā
ga 217 ke mū 153 vina baḷapa grāmavanu kukeda subraṁhmaṇya
dēvara Amrutapaḍi dharmagaḷanū śivārpaṇavāgi samarpi
sidevāgi Ā grāmada dēvarige navara dharma
nayivēdya dina 1 kaṁ Akkihā 1 lu tiṁgaḷu
hā krayava ga 1¢0 māna
Ubhaya

yeṁṇe dīpti 6 kkaṁ varga Ubhava naḍasida ta śrī
maṁ mahāmaṁḍalēśvara Aḷiyarāmappa Ayyana Arsu
gaḷavarige dharmavāgi naḍasu brāṁhma 6 . rāmarāja
vadēva mahā Arasugaḷavarige dharmadhāreyanu
nāvu śivārpaṇavāgi naḍasida brāṁhara ja 12
brāṁhara ja 24 maṁdi dharmachatraka vaga 56 Aḍige
hmara ja 1 kaṁ vaga 293 Avaraga 96
da grāmavanu Ā grāmakke saluva nidhinikṣēpa jalapā
ṣāṇa Akṣiṇi Āgāmi sidhasādhyadoḷu
śivārpaṇavāgi biṭṭaru . yī
darmavanu Acaṁdrārkkavāgi naḍasade Avaroḷobbanaḷi
pidavanu taṁna taṁdetāyigaḷanu goU brāṁhmaranu kāśi
yali koṁdapāpakke hōhanu yī dharmalu Acaṁdrārkka
vāgi naḍasabahaduyeṁdu koṭṭa dharmaśāsana
makku śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 27.202 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
